name: Tycoons Group Enterprise Co.,Ltd.
summary: Tycoons Group Enterprise Co.,Ltd. produces and sells steel products worldwide. It offers billets; steel wire rods; steel bars; spheroidizing annealing wires; and drywall, roofing, wood, self-tapping, chipboard, Euro, collated, and window screws, as well as shear connectors. The company was founded in 1980 and is based in Kaohsiung City, Taiwan.
